title: rubus adenophorus
intro: Rubus adenophorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus adenophorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and even help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
